summary: Missing fixture files (fixtures/*.json) required for workflow execution. Three repetitive fixture-test steps (lines 46–87) duplicate identical pattern—should use matrix strategy or loop. pwsh -File call redundant within shell: pwsh; violates spirit of avoiding nesting. run-act-tests.ps1 provided but never invoked by workflow; integration path unclear. No artifact collection for required act-result.txt. Core script logic well-structured; Set-StrictMode and error handling solid.
